title: Zero In Ultra Power Wasp & Hornet Nest Killer Foam - Insecticidal Wasp Nest Destroyer Foam Spray for Indoor & Outdoor Nest Removal - Effective Up to 4 Metres, Kills 4-7 Nests - 600ml Trigger Aerosol
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

EFFECTIVE NEST REMOVAL - This Wasp & Hornet Nest Killer Foam is a powerful insecticidal spray for indoor and outdoor use. With a reach of up to 4 metres, it ensures safe application of the wasp nest. The 600ml can effectively kill 4 to 7 wasp nests, acting as a wasp killer and wasp nest destroyer

USER-FRIENDLY TRIGGER MECHANISM - The Wasp Nest Killer features an easy-to-use trigger for precise application. Simply push up the trigger lock with your thumb and squeeze to release the foam jet. This design allows for controlled and targeted spraying, minimising accidental contact

FOR BEST RESULTS - Use the Wasp Killer Foam in the late evening when wasps are less active. This reduces the risk of wasp attacks and ensures most of the colony is present. The fast-acting wasp spray delivers knockdown within seconds and kills within minutes, serving as an efficient wasp destroyer

SAFETY PRECAUTIONS - Wear protective clothing during the treatment to avoid stings and minimise exposure to the insecticide. When using the wasp foam outdoors, consider the wind direction to prevent foam blowback. Avoid contact with paintwork to ensure safety and maintain surfaces

ULTRA POWER INSECT CONTROL - Our high-performance Ultra Power products from Zero In will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in pest control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems
